name: Gold Touch Limousine
recent_news: No web presence located; appears to be a micro 1-2 person limousine/livery operation in Mosinee, WI. Not identified as a school-bus or student-transport contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. This is a limousine/livery micro-operator, not a school-bus/SPED contractor; no fleet, district contracts, or scale relevant to a tuck-in.

name: Wheelchair Service-Black Hills
recent_news: Listed as 'Wheelchair Services of the Black Hills' on yellow-pages/goservices directory aggregators; no own website, no school-district contracts identified. Care-A-Ride (separate company) appears to be the main local NEMT provider since 2019.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Single-operator wheelchair/NEMT in Rapid City, SD; no school-bus or SPED route business identified. Outside Summit's tuck-in profile.

name: Blessed & Qualified Transport
recent_news: Registered as 'Blessed Qualified Transport Co' NPI 1578747002 — Non-emergency Medical Transport (VAN), Milwaukee. Also holds USDOT 3274512 ('Blessed & Qualified Transportation Co Inc'). Wisconsin-incorporated ~2003; ~2 employees, ~$110K revenue.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Pure NEMT van operator (Medicare/Medicaid), not a school-bus/SPED route contractor; sub-scale (~2 employees) and no district contracts identified.

name: Oxford Care Transport
recent_news: No direct web presence located for 'Oxford Care Transport'; only adjacent Milwaukee NEMT providers (Specialized Care Transport, All Care Transportation) surfaced in search. Likely a micro NEMT van operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Single-operator Milwaukee NEMT with no identifiable school-bus/SPED route business, fleet, or district contracts.

name: Phase II Care Transport
districts_or_customers: Milwaukee County DHHS adult/disability transport network (general)
recent_news: Operates as Phase II Care Transport / Phase II Enterprises (NPI 1043488737) since ~2001; BBB file opened 2009 (not accredited). Affiliated 'Phase II Transportation Inc' also appears in carrier records. Provides disabled transport in Milwaukee; ~25 years in business.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Long-tenured but micro-scale NEMT/elder-care van operator in Milwaukee; no school-bus or SPED district routes identified. Owner ~25 years in business could suggest succession, but lack of school-transport scope rules out a tuck-in.
